chunks.title: David's Sons Born at Hebron
chunks.reason: A list of David's sons born during his time in Hebron.

chunks.title: Abner's Defection to David
chunks.reason: The narrative of Abner's conflict with Ish-bosheth and his alliance with David.

chunks.title: Joab Kills Abner
chunks.reason: The account of Joab's revenge against Abner after David sent him away.

chunks.title: David's Lament and Reaction
chunks.reason: David's public mourning, oath, and reflection on the political situation.
